opportunities.title: Software Engineer Intern
opportunities.description:
Build/Integrate tools to automate the process and improve the efficiency
Create, maintain and improve Game call pattern simulation code in C++/Scala to support applications and features 
Perform stress and load testing. This includes coming up with a test design, game play driven scenarios and evaluating actual game logs to come up with an accurate representation of load to generate and setting up complex distributed test environment to run tests and generate load 
Execute tests and provide accurate analysis and reporting of test results

opportunities.title: Software Engineering, New Grad
opportunities.description:
Preferred qualifications : 
>One or more areas of specialized knowledge balanced with general skills and knowledge, such as knowing more frontend technologies and, at a high level, how a service handles an HTTP request
>Experience in code review practices, and an understanding of how to safely update production systems
>Familiarity with navigating and managing work in large code bases
opportunities.notes:
Office locations : Bengaluru
Job type : Full time

opportunities.title: Machine Learning Intern @ SmartBridge
opportunities.description:
Job Description
Roles and Responsibilities:
• Exploring latest tech products in the respective domain.
• Collaborate on creating machine learning models using Python, TensorFlow, and other AI libraries.
• Dive into data analysis and preprocessing to ensure data quality and relevance.
• Build Guided projects and Mentor the learners
• Work closely with team members to deliver AI proof of concept projects on time.
• Gain and share knowledge in the fascinating field of AI. Shall involve in mentoring / training activities.
• Keep up-to-date with the latest AI and Machine Learning research, trends, and best practices.
• Building Proof- of- Concepts for the problem statement.
• Exploring/Developing Computational Algorithms.
